post.content:
Hello,
I am currently interviewing for Uber and have my onsite next week, there is one round called depth in specialization, and I am not sure how is it going to be different than a normal coding round, if someone who has recently given interviews can shed some light on how the interview is conduct and what is the pattern, that would be great? 
Also please share resources as well to learn for this and system design round :D

Can they ask us to prepare/draw LLD diagrams in the interview, or just coding using OOPS is sufficient?
Could you please share what they asked about in this round?
From MLE POV, Was asked to write k-means from scratch.
Can someone explain how and from where to to prepare for this?
Anyone of you folks , any update ?\nCan you please share the experience.\nThanks in advance
@Op and others any updates here? What was involved in this round?
Hey, I have mine too. Can you please share your experience and types of questions asked?
what do the coding rounds look like for uber SDE role?

Hey man, is it for Denmark? I too have an onsite soon. I didn't schedule yet.
I have the same question so I came here :D 

Additionally, in the Next steps mail I have received It doesn't explicitly mention "language idiomatic" for this round so I was wondering if language is still a free choice :)

There are some standard questions that uber asks in this, you can go through leetcode uber tagged interviews possibly buy premium and try to solve them, focus is on concurrency and design principles with most optimized data structure\n\nHow many years of experience are you having?
